hooks.command: node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const f=(JSON.parse(d).tool_input||{}).file_path||''; process.stdout.write(f)})" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && git add "$f" && git commit -m "Auto-save: update $(basename \"$f\")" && git push; } 2>/dev/null || true
